text: About Me

I am a full-stack developer and UI designer passionate about building tools that combine engineering precision with visual craftsmanship. My work spans from interactive UI design systems and full-stack web applications to academic research in structural engineering. I believe great software lives at the intersection of functional depth and aesthetic clarity.
Full-stack development: Python (FastAPI), JavaScript/React, Electron
UI/UX design: HTML/CSS/SVG animation, glassmorphism, 3D transforms, responsive layouts
Platform engineering: Nginx, systemd, SQLite, server deployment
Academic research: Gaussian Mixture Models, structural vibration analysis, MATLAB
EC LAB — UI Design System

EC LAB (ec.edisonc.top) is my personal design laboratory where I explore the boundaries of front-end visual expression. Each project is a self-contained, single-file HTML/CSS/JS experiment — no frameworks, no CDN, no external assets. Every visual element is built from scratch using inline SVG, CSS gradients, blur filters, 3D transforms, and backdrop-filter effects.
Design Philosophy: Every component should feel like a physical object — with weight, depth, texture, and responsive motion. No generic UI.
1. Blue Glass Triptych
A three-panel poster/gallery layout with deep cobalt blue and white blurred radial fields. Features glassmorphism pill labels, abstract silhouette-like blue blur forms, and minimal brand identity.

caption: Blue Glass Triptych — Glassmorphism poster gallery with deep cobalt blue radial fields

text: 2. Flip Word Notes
An interactive vocabulary flashcard system with physical page-flip animation using CSS 3D transforms. Cards feature a top-bound flip with perspective, rotateX, and transform-origin: top center.

caption: Flip Word Notes — 3D page-flip flashcard with CSS perspective transforms

text: 3. Global Payments Hero

A FinTech landing page hero with soft white rounded page shell, clean navigation, and large centered global payments headline. Features mixed sans and italic serif typography, blue-accent CTA buttons, and floating 3D-style payment icon tiles.

caption: Global Payments Hero — FinTech landing page with grid-and-glow background

text: 4. Charging Progress Card

A centered dark rounded-square charging/progress card with soft 3D shadows, dotted texture, and numbered 0/50/100 scale. Features an animated glowing capsule progress bar with linked ambient glow and a breathing status dot.

caption: Charging Progress — Dark card with animated glow capsule and hue-based color system

text: 5. Fluid Interactive Cards

Three responsive fluid interactive glass cards with animated 3D dot matrices, frosted glass panels, and colored glow themes. Each card responds to mouse movement with lerped 3D tilt, mouse-tracked glare, and parallax layers.

caption: Fluid Interactive Cards — 3D tilt, mouse-tracked glare, and parallax glass cards

text: 6. Ostraka UI Cards
A three-card visual identity layout with bold pink and soft blue panels. Features large clean sans-serif typography, minimal arrow marks, geometric SVG shapes, and strong negative space.

caption: Ostraka UI Cards — Bold pink and soft blue editorial card layout

text: 7. Pixel Icon Library

A clean vertical pixel icon library archive with soft off-white background, white rounded category cards, and rose accent details. Each row shows pixel-style emoji icons with compact category metadata.

caption: Pixel Icon Library — Rose-tinted category archive with pixel emoji icons

text: 8. Visual Notes Magnifier

An interactive visual notes page with a circular glass magnifier that follows pointer/touch movement. Features duplicated content layers, a circular clipped magnified layer, frosted physical lens with etched conic tick marks, and glass refraction shadows.

caption: Visual Notes Magnifier — Interactive circular glass lens with pointer tracking

text: 9. Craft Family Design System

A dark-themed design language showcase extracted from the Craft Family ecosystem. Core visual elements include radial ambient lighting, glassmorphism product cards with gentle float animation and shine sweep, series toggle (Efficiency white / Life yellow), blur-in entrance, dock navigation with active glow states, and a glass modal with backdrop blur. The palette is anchored by Craft Black (#171717), Craft Yellow (#facc15), and Craft Gray (#f5f5f7). Typography pairs Inter with JetBrains Mono. All interactions are implemented in pure CSS/JS without external dependencies.
Worthwise — Valuation Workbench

Worthwise is a full-stack independent valuation workbench deployed at edsionc.top/wvp. It provides retail investors with a transparent, evidence-based company valuation tool — combining DCF modeling, relative valuation, and AI-powered fact-checking in a guided workflow.
Tech Stack: Backend (Python FastAPI + SQLite) · Frontend (React 18 + Vite + Tailwind CSS + Ant Design) · Desktop (Electron) · Deployment (Nginx + systemd)
Architecture

The backend is built with FastAPI providing RESTful APIs for authentication, session management, DCF recalculation, and multi-market company search (US, Hong Kong, A-share). SQLite serves as the persistence layer with a clean protocol-based store abstraction. The frontend is a React 18 SPA with Vite bundling, featuring a component library built on Radix UI primitives and Ant Design.
Key Features
DCF Valuation Engine: Free cash flow projection, terminal value calculation, and sensitivity analysis
AI Fact-Checking: Evidence validation with source tracking, confidence scoring, and truth verification
Multi-Market Search: Company lookup by ticker, Chinese name, English name, or pinyin across US/HK/A-share
Dual-Mode Workbench: Beginner guided mode with step-by-step wizards and Advanced Beta grid for pro users
Bilingual i18n: Full English and Simplified Chinese UI with inline explanation hints
Electron Desktop App: Cross-platform desktop application with admin panel for user management
Staged Workflow: Build → Review → Read pipeline with Kanban-style result board
Technical Highlights

The application implements a three-stage valuation pipeline: Build (data input and assumption setting), Review (value, trust, evidence, and next-move analysis), and Read (tag-style emphasis for result interpretation). The DCF engine supports multiple model strategies with real-time recalculation, while the AI service layer abstracts provider selection (DeepSeek/Claude/mock) through a factory pattern.
GMM Thesis — Academic Research

Master's thesis research on Gaussian Mixture Model (GMM) surrogate modeling for human-induced floor vibration response in long-span structures. The research addresses the computational inefficiency of traditional Monte Carlo simulations by developing a probabilistic surrogate model.
Research Contributions
Developed a GMM-based surrogate model to replace costly Monte Carlo simulations for floor vibration analysis
Implemented Latin Hypercube Sampling (LHS) for efficient parameter space exploration
Validated the model against AISC design guidelines and international human-induced vibration standards
Applied viscous damper optimization for vibration mitigation in long-span floor systems
Technical Implementation

The research workflow included Python scripts for data processing and template generation, MATLAB for structural analysis and GMM implementation, and OriginLab for scientific visualization. The thesis defense presentation was built as an interactive open-slide deck — a React-based slide framework rendering 1920×1080 canvas pages.
EDSIONC Platform

EDSIONC (edsionc.top) is my personal technology platform that serves as the umbrella for all my projects. It hosts the EC LAB design system, the Worthwise valuation workbench, and provides a unified deployment infrastructure.
Platform Architecture
Nginx reverse proxy routing multiple sub-applications under a single domain
systemd service management for backend processes with automatic restart
Python server with automatic project discovery for the EC LAB preview gallery
Independent authentication and data stores between sub-applications
